## Incident Classification

**Type:** (Check one)
- [ ] Medical Emergency (Code Blue)
- [ ] Lost Child (Code Yellow)
- [ ] Weather Emergency (Code White)
- [ ] Suspicious Activity (Code Orange)
- [ ] Vendor Dispute
- [ ] Customer Complaint
- [ ] Property Damage
- [ ] Theft/Security
- [ ] Other: _______________

**Severity Level:**
- [ ] Critical (required 911/emergency services)
- [ ] High (required supervisor intervention)
- [ ] Medium (resolved on-site)
- [ ] Low (documented for records)
